title: 毎日王冠の後に・運命、彼方に集いて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she wins the race, the phenomenal
running Mejiro Ardan witnesses from Oguri Cap
and the other racers leaves a lasting impression
on her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the racers exchange compliments after the
race, Inari One reveals that the Eternal Top Three
will all be present at the upcoming autumn Tenno
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan is elated to learn that she'll get to
meet the Eternal Top Three on the turf. The
autumn Tenno Sho—history's turning point—is
fast approaching.
